programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: Courtside - Live
programme.desc: Coverage of professional tennis matches.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.desc: Adelaide Crows v North Melbourne Kangaroos.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Melbourne Demons v Hawthorn Hawks.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: A look back at the all-English clash between Man United and Chelsea in 2008. Plus, Real Madrid's victory against city rivals Atletico in 2014.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine
programme.desc: The latest news and updates from Europe's premier club football competition.

programme.desc: A round-up of the latest news and highlights.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at UFC 245 as welterweights Kamaru Usman and Colby Covington met in Las Vegas' Octagon in December 2019.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at the classic February 2020 UFC 247 meeting between Jon Jones and Dominick Reyes in Texas.

programme.title: ABB FIA Formula E World Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the first race of the Monaco e-Prix.

programme.title: ABB FIA Formula E World Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the second race of the Monaco e-Prix.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour
programme.desc: Action from the Grand Prix of Madrid.

programme.desc: Essendon Bombers v Fremantle Dockers.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Sale Sharks v Leicester Tigers.

programme.title: No Filter Football
programme.desc: A special behind the scenes look at Chelsea v Manchester City in the FA Cup final.

programme.title: Live: Men's Giro d'Italia
programme.desc: Coverage from the 10th stage of the race, an individual time trial 42km route from Viareggio to Massa.

programme.title: Uphill Climb
programme.desc: The inspirational journey of the Women's Tour de France, held from 1984-1989. These athletes defied norms and paved the way for today's Tour de France Avec Zwift.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from the Grand Prix of Catalunya sprint race.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from the Grand Prix of Catalunya MotoGP race.

programme.title: World Superbike Rewind
programme.desc: Action from the latest round of the season in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: British Superbikes Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at the best action from the second round of the season at Donington Park.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: Rob Hatch presents news from the world of cycling.

programme.title: Giro d'Italia Men Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 10th stage of the race.

programme.title: Women's Cycling World Tour
programme.desc: A look back at the 2026 Vuelta a Espana.

programme.title: Premier League Stories
programme.desc: A look back at the extraordinary story of Leicester City’s Premier League title-winning season.

programme.title: The Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Action from the Emirates FA Cup.

programme.title: The Isuzu FA Vase
programme.desc: AFC Stoneham v Cockfosters in the final.

programme.title: The Isuzu FA Trophy
programme.desc: Southend United v Wealdstone in the final.

programme.title: UFC
programme.desc: Arnold Allen v Melquizael Costa.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: From Potsdam, Germany.

programme.title: Fight Sports MMA
programme.desc: Cheyanne Vlismas vs. Karolina Wojcik, strawweights bout. Bonus coverage includes Rodrique Kena vs. Sifiso Ngcobo.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Competitions in kickboxing and Mui Thai.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Featuring Kisenosato, Kakuryu, Harumafuji and Hakuho from the Natsu basho, in 2014.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Presenting sumo by covering the rules, ranks, matchups and more.

programme.title: Fight Sports Martial Arts
programme.desc: Coverage of judo, sumo, karate and other disciplines of martial arts.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: From May 09, 2008.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Liverpool Football
programme.desc: An encore presentation of Liverpool's on-field action from the past week plus behind-the-scenes team access and social media clips.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: A showcase of the most popular videos and social media highlights from across Liverpool Football Club, its players and its supporters.

programme.title: World Chase Tag
programme.desc: Parkour and Ninja Warrior athletes compete against each other in high-level action matches of tag during international tournaments.

programme.title: Life in Between Gates
programme.desc: Following racers as they prepare for their first event of the season in Colorado.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Chips, words, and chicken wings are flying at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Busch Stadium in St. Louis.

programme.title: Men's College Tennis
programme.desc: From Dan Magill Tennis Complex in Athens, Ga.

programme.title: CFP National Championship
programme.desc: Top-seeded Indiana (15-0) faces No. 10 Miami in the CFP National Championship. After routing Oregon in the semifinals, the Hoosiers look to complete a perfect season against a Hurricanes team that has a 13-2 overall scoring record.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: At Cisco's, open since 1950, the migas and huevos rancheros are good as ever; on the east side, tracking Kareem El-Ghayesh of KG BBQ, a new arrival from Cairo, Egypt, who has learned to two-step and introduced Texas to pomegranate-speckled ribs.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Exploring the oil and cattle work that puts money in pockets and ribeyes on tables; Cattlemen's Steakhouse, open since 1910, sits hard by the Oklahoma National Stockyards; Junior's Supper Club, owned by the Shumsky family.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: John T. Edge travels around the region, introducing viewers to Southern tastemakers, food, culture and history.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Singleton grew up in Greenwood, S.C. and now lives on the outskirts of Spartanburg with his partner Glenda Guion, a ceramicist; they make their living as artists, working in side-by-side backyard sheds, accompanied by their dog, Cleo.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The crew joins their guide Caleb Johnson at the onetime center of the Alabama coal mining industry as they document the legacies of that hard work; Johnson has plenty of familiarity with the area as grew up in the nearby town of Arley.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 6 Fighting Irish face a tough test in the No. 10 Hurricanes. Miami won the last meeting, 41-8 in 2017. Notre Dame came up short against Ohio State 34-23 in the national title game last season. Miami was ranked as high as No. 4 in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Gators visit the No. 4 Hurricanes in a Florida Cup contest. In 2024, Miami won the first renewal of the three-way rivalry series in five years, beating Florida 41-17 in the process. Miami comes off a 49-12 beatdown of then-No. 18 South Florida.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 3 Hurricanes visit the No. 18 Seminoles. Miami leads the rivalry series 36-33 after beating Florida State 36-14 in 2024. FSU is coming off a double-overtime loss to Virginia on Sept. 26. Miami last played Sept. 20, beating Florida 26-7.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cardinals (4-1, 1-1 ACC) try to bounce back against a tough foe in the No. 2 Hurricanes (5-0, 1-0). Louisville dropped its first game of the season in a 30-27 overtime decision versus Virginia on Oct. 4. Miami defeated Louisville 52-45 last year.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: NBA Tip-Off
programme.desc: Host Ernie Johnson and analysts Shaquille O'Neal, Charles Barkley and Kenny Smith ready viewers for NBA action before ESPN's Wednesday night doubleheaders (and other select telecasts). Guest analysts also are featured from time to time.

programme.title: Live: NBA Courtside
programme.desc: An insight into upcoming National Basketball Association matches, highlighting the players to watch and the top team news.

programme.desc: Bath Rugby v Newcastle Red Bulls.

programme.desc: Harlequins v Exeter Chiefs.

programme.desc: Sale Sharks v Leicester Tigers.

programme.desc: A look back at all of the biggest stories and best action from the 16th round of fixtures, including Bath Rugby v Newcastle Red Bulls, Northampton Saints v Bristol Bears, and more.

programme.title: The Breakdown
programme.desc: A look at Gallagher PREM side Gloucester Rugby.

programme.title: Reframe the Game
programme.desc: The story of the rise of top-flight women's rugby.

programme.desc: A look back at all of the biggest stories and best action from the 16th round of fixtures, including Bath Rugby v Newcastle Red Bulls, Northampton Saints v Bristol Bears, and more.

programme.desc: Darren Fletcher is joined by Martin Keown, Owen Hargreaves, Joe Cole and Ally McCoist to discuss the stars of the 2025/26 Premier League season.

programme.title: Sign Up - Into Football
programme.desc: Fulham special, featuring head coach Marco Silva and captain Tom Cairney. Glenn Hoddle on the Premier League, FA Cup and World Cup. Plus, England Deaf Women win "])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"the Futsal Euros.

programme.desc: Action from the 10th stage of the race.

programme.desc: A look at the upcoming MLB action.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: New York Yankees v Toronto Blue Jays (Start-time 12.05am). Coverage of the American League match from Yankee Stadium, as the American League East rivals go head to head in the second game of a three-match series.

programme.title: Live NBA Playoffs
programme.desc: A match-up from the NBA playoffs.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Sky Sports Breakfast
programme.desc: Stay across the biggest sports stories this morning with a wrap-up of the headlines.

programme.title: Live: Sky Sports FC
programme.desc: Have your say on the big talking points in this interactive show covering the major football headlines.

programme.title: Lunchtime Live
programme.desc: Sit down with Sky Sports News as the team break down all the sports stories making the headlines this lunchtime.

programme.title: Sports Desk
programme.desc: A breakdown of the stories hitting the news desk this afternoon, with live analysis and comment plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live IPL Rajasthan.R v Lucknow.SG
programme.desc: Rajasthan Royals face Lucknow Super Giants in the IPL.

programme.title: Live PL: Bournemouth v Man City
programme.desc: Bournemouth play host to Manchester City at the Vitality Stadium in the Premier League.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion anglers DeFoe and Lane compete to catch the largest bass.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Bassmaster Classic champion Ott DeFoe imitates Louisiana's crawfish population as he hunts down double-digit largemouth bass in the grassy lakes of Louisiana.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: 1 year ago Z and good friend Neil Vandebiezen had a magical Smallmouth day. Same spot, a year to the day later. Can they do it again?

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Spencer Shuffield and Todd Goade fight for the Ultimate Match Fishing title on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Four teams compete in Florida for Elimination Match 1 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Lisa returns to the pristine waters of Northern Saskatchewan in search of a trophy lake trout and reels in the adventure of a lifetime at Cheemo Lodge.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Alyx Parks is fishing the North Platte River with Blake Jackson from the Ugly Bug Fly Shop.

programme.title: Connect Fishing Experiences
programme.desc: Another epic day on the mighty Fraser River with good friend Neil Warkentin of Hooked Up Fishing Adventures.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Showcasing the incredible walleye and bass fishing opportunities across Northern Ontario, the lakes, lures and lodges.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Our hosts travel to Pipestone Lake in NW Ontario for a potpourri of iconic Canadian fish species.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Ling Cod Strategies Vancouver Island.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Last-minute plans take Mike to Port Hardy for an action-packed day of fishing with his good buddy Mike Kelly.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: There is no end to the walleye on Crawling Valley Reservoir in the Brooks Region.

programme.desc: Lisa returns to the pristine waters of Northern Saskatchewan in search of a trophy lake trout and reels in the adventure of a lifetime at Cheemo Lodge.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: The story of a local boy who grows up to be a Bass Master Champion.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Bass move shallow during the spring; when they do so, they feed up on baitfish and shad. A bait that is very effective in these scenarios is a soft plastic jerkbait; host Wade Middleton breaks down all things soft plastic jerkbait fishing during the spring.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Having your own bass fishing sanctuary is amazing, and the team from American Sportfish teaches us how to manage it!

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and James Lindner head to a remote outpost to chase wilderness muskies on Lac Seul.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Fine fishing draws a crowd, fueling good times fishing and booming economic impact, as the In-Fisherman staff highlights exceptional fisheries from across North America; goes big-boat salmon slayin' out of Winthrop Harbor on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: The Next Bite
programme.desc: Jason Przekurat and Jake Caughey use a variety of baits and live bait to target great walleyes on Gull Lake in northern MN.

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Provides competitive team tournaments designed for working men and women across the state of Texas.

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour; top 50 National Championship held at Sweetwater Marina in Delaccroix, La.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: The story of a local boy who grows up to be a Bass Master Champion.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Bass move shallow during the spring; when they do so, they feed up on baitfish and shad. A bait that is very effective in these scenarios is a soft plastic jerkbait; host Wade Middleton breaks down all things soft plastic jerkbait fishing during the spring.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Having your own bass fishing sanctuary is amazing, and the team from American Sportfish teaches us how to manage it!

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and James Lindner head to a remote outpost to chase wilderness muskies on Lac Seul.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Fine fishing draws a crowd, fueling good times fishing and booming economic impact, as the In-Fisherman staff highlights exceptional fisheries from across North America; goes big-boat salmon slayin' out of Winthrop Harbor on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: The Next Bite
programme.desc: Jason Przekurat and Jake Caughey use a variety of baits and live bait to target great walleyes on Gull Lake in northern MN.

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Provides competitive team tournaments designed for working men and women across the state of Texas.

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour; top 50 National Championship held at Sweetwater Marina in Delaccroix, La.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: The story of a local boy who grows up to be a Bass Master Champion.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Bass move shallow during the spring; when they do so, they feed up on baitfish and shad. A bait that is very effective in these scenarios is a soft plastic jerkbait; host Wade Middleton breaks down all things soft plastic jerkbait fishing during the spring.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Having your own bass fishing sanctuary is amazing, and the team from American Sportfish teaches us how to manage it!

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and James Lindner head to a remote outpost to chase wilderness muskies on Lac Seul.

programme.desc: Fine fishing draws a crowd, fueling good times fishing and booming economic impact, as the In-Fisherman staff highlights exceptional fisheries from across North America; goes big-boat salmon slayin' out of Winthrop Harbor on Lake Michigan.

programme.desc: Jason Przekurat and Jake Caughey use a variety of baits and live bait to target great walleyes on Gull Lake in northern MN.

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour

programme.title: Jokers Wild off the Hook
programme.desc: Sparky Sparkes and his family travel to fish and have adventures in the U.S. and abroad.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Larry Smith, Chad Bleeker, and Jeremy Stoner hunt tuna and mahi in Florida, sharing expert bait and fishing tips.

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Professional angler Jon Thelen takes you on fishing adventures revealing simple techniques to catch more fish across the Midwest and Canada.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Captain Mike Frenette guides Bill for big bull redfish!

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: In part 2, Bill continues to Go Big or Go Home, using a larger, slower moving bait to catch bigger bass.
